u: Ibrahim ne kaha “aey farstaadgaan-e-ilaahi (envoys), kya mohim aapko dar-pesh hai

ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرۡسِلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمࣲ مُّجۡرِمِينَ
t: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena
u: Unhon ne kaha “hum ek mujrim qaum ki taraf bheje gaye hain
Taa-ke uspar paki hui mitti ke patthar (clay-stones) barsa de
Jo aapke Rubb ke haan hadd se guzar jane walon ke liye nishan zada hain”

ar: فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Faakhrajna man kana feeha mina almumineena
u: Phir humne un sab logon ko nikal liya jo us basti mein momin thay

ar: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
t: Fama wajadna feeha ghayra baytin mina almuslimeena
u: Aur wahan humne ek ghar ke siwa musalmano ka koi ghar na paya

ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةࣰ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
t: Watarakna feeha ayatan lillatheena yakhafoona alAAathaba alaleema
u: Uske baad humne wahan bas ek nishani un logon ke liye chodh di jo dardnaak azaab se darte hon

ar: وَفِي مُوسَىٰٓ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطَٰنࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
t: Wafee moosa ith arsalnahu ila firAAawna bisultanin mubeenin
u: Aur (tumhare liye nishani hai) Moosa ke qissey mein jab humne usey sareeh sanad (clear authority) ke saath Firoun ke paas bheja

ar: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكۡنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونࣱ‏
t: Fatawalla biruknihi waqala sahirun aw majnoonun
u: To woh apne bal-bootay par akad gaya aur bola yeh jaadugar hai ya majnoon(deewana) hai

ar: فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمࣱ‏
t: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahu fanabathnahum fee alyammi wahuwa muleemun
u: Aakhir-e-kaar humne usey aur uske lashkaron ko pakda aur sabko samandar mein phenk diya aur woh malamat zadah hokar reh gaya

ar: وَفِي عَادٍ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلۡعَقِيمَ
t: Wafee AAadin ith arsalna AAalayhimu alrreeha alAAaqeema
u: Aur (tumhare liye nishani hai) Aad (people of Aad) mein, jabke humne unpar ek aisi hi bay-khair(devastating) hawa bhej di

ar: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَيۡءٍ أَتَتۡ عَلَيۡهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
t: Ma tatharu min shayin atat AAalayhi illa jaAAalathu kaalrrameemi
u: Ke jis cheez par bhi woh guzar gayi usey boseeda (rotten) karke rakh diya

ar: وَفِي ثَمُودَ إِذۡ قِيلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ حَتَّىٰ حِينࣲ‏
t: Wafee thamooda ith qeela lahum tamattaAAoo hatta heenin
u: Aur (tumhare liye nishani hai) Samood mein, jab unse kaha gaya tha ke ek khaas waqt tak mazey karlo

ar: فَعَتَوۡاْ عَنۡ أَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ وَهُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ
t: FaAAataw AAan amri rabbihim faakhathathumu alssaAAiqatu wahum yanthuroona
u: Magar is tambeeh(warning) par bhi unhon ne apne Rubb ke hukum se sartabi (brazenly disobey) ki. Aakhir-e-kar unke dekhte dekhte ek achanak toot padne waley azaab ne unko aa liya

ar: فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مِن قِيَامࣲ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنتَصِرِينَ
t: Fama istataAAoo min qiyamin wama kanoo muntasireena
u: Phir na unmein uthne ki sakat thi aur na woh apna bachao kar sakte thay

ar: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحࣲ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمࣰ ا فَٰسِقِينَ
t: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena
u: Aur in sabse pehle humne Nooh ki qaum ko halaak kiya kyunke woh fasiq (wicked) log thay
Aasman ko humne apne zoar se banaya hai aur hum iski qudrat rakhte hain
Zameen ko humne bichaya hai aur hum badey acchey hamwar(Smoothers/ spread) karne waley hain

ar: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
t: Wamin kulli shayin khalaqna zawjayni laAAallakum tathakkaroona
u: Aur har cheez ke humne jodey banaye hain, shayad ke tum ussey sabaq lo

ar: فَفِرُّوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنۡهُ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Fafirroo ila Allahi innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun
u: To daudo Allah ki taraf , main tumahre liye us ki taraf se saaf saaf khabardar karne wala hoon

ar: وَلَا تَجۡعَلُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنۡهُ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Wala tajAAaloo maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun
u: Aur na banao Allah ke saath koi dusra mabood. Main tumahre liye uski taraf se saaf saaf khabardar karne wala hoon

ar: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُواْ سَاحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونٌ
t: Kathalika ma ata allatheena min qablihim min rasoolin illa qaloo sahirun aw majnoonun
u: Yunhi hota raha hai, inse pehle ki qaumon ke paas bhi koi Rasool aisa nahin aaya jisey unhon ne yeh na kaha ho ke yeh saahir (sorcerer) hai ya majnoon(deewana)

ar: أَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِهِۦۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمࣱ طَاغُونَ
t: Atawasaw bihi bal hum qawmun taghoona
u: Kya in sab ne apas mein ispar koi samjhauta karliya hai? Nahin, balke yeh sab sarkash log hain
Pas aey Nabi, inse rukh pher lo, tumpar kuch malamat nahin
Albatta nasihat karte raho, kyunke nasihat imaan laney walon ke liye nafeh(faiyda-mand) hai

ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ ٱلۡجِنَّ وَٱلۡإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُونِ
t: Wama khalaqtu aljinna waalinsa illa liyaAAbudooni
u: Maine Jinn aur Insano ko iske siwa kisi kaam ke liye paida nahin kiya hai ke woh meri bandagi karein

ar: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنۡهُم مِّن رِّزۡقࣲ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطۡعِمُونِ
t: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wama oreedu an yutAAimooni
u: Main unsey koi rizq nahin chahta aur na yeh chahta hoon ke woh mujhey khilayein

ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلۡقُوَّةِ ٱلۡمَتِينُ
t: Inna Allaha huwa alrrazzaqu thoo alquwwati almateenu
u: Allah to khud hi Razzak hai, badi quwwat wala aur zabardast

ar: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ ذَنُوبࣰ ا مِّثۡلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصۡحَٰبِهِمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونِ
t: Fainna lillatheena thalamoo thanooban mithla thanoobi ashabihim fala yastaAAjiloona
u: Pas jin logon ne zulm kiya hai unke hissey ka bhi waisa hi azaab tayyar hai jaisa inhi jaise logon ko unke hissey ka mil chuka hai, iske liye yeh log jaldi na machayein

ar: فَوَيۡلࣱ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن يَوۡمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
t: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min yawmihimu allathee yooAAadoona
u: Aakhir ko tabahi hai kufr karne walon ke liye us roz jiska inhein khauff dilaya jaa raha hai
Kasam hai Tur (Mount) ki
Aur ek aisi khuli kitaab ki
Jo raqeeq jild(fine parchment) mein likkhi hui hai
Aur aabaad (much-frequented) ghar ki
Aur unchi chatt (canopy) ki
Aur maujzan samandar (swelling sea) ki
Ke tere Rubb ka azaab zaroor waqeh honay wala hai
Jisey koi dafa karne wala nahin
Woh us roz waqeh hoga jab aasmaan buri tarah dagmagayega
Aur pahad udey udey phirenge
Tabahi hai us roz un jhutlane walon ke liye
Jo aaj khel ke taur par apni hujjat baaziyon mein lagey huey hain

ar: يَوۡمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
t: Yawma yudaAAAAoona ila nari jahannama daAAAAan
u: Jis din unhein dhakke maar maar kar naar-e-jahannum (fire of hell) ki taraf le chala jayega

ar: هَٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
t: Hathihi alnnaru allatee kuntum biha tukaththiboona
u: Us waqt unse kaha jayega ke “ yeh wahi aag hai jisey tum jhutlaya karte thay

ar: أَفَسِحۡرٌ هَٰذَآ أَمۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
t: Afasihrun hatha am antum la tubsiroona
u: Ab batao yeh jaadu hai ya tumhein soojh nahin raha hai

ar: ٱصۡلَوۡهَا فَٱصۡبِرُوٓاْ أَوۡ لَا تَصۡبِرُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ إِنَّمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Islawha faisbiroo aw la tasbiroo sawaon AAalaykum innama tujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Jao ab jhulso iske andar, tum khwa sabr karo ya na karo, tumhare liye yaksan hai, tumhein waisa hi badla diya ja raha hai jaise tum amal kar rahey thay
Muttaqi log wahan baagon (gardens) aur niyamaton mein hongey

ar: فَٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ وَوَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Fakiheena bima atahum rabbuhum wawaqahum rabbuhum AAathaba aljaheemi
u: Lutf le rahe hongey un cheezon se jo unka Rubb unhein dega, aur unka Rubb unhein dozakh ke azaab se bacha lega

ar: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima kuntum taAAmaloona
u: (Unse kaha jayega) khao aur peo mazey se apne un aamaal ke siley mein jo tum karte rahey ho

ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرࣲ مَّصۡفُوفَةࣲۖ وَزَوَّجۡنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينࣲ‏
t: Muttakieena AAala sururin masfoofatin wazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeenin
u: Woh aamne saamne bichey huey takhaton(thrones) par takiye(couches) lagaye baithey hongey aur hum khoobsurat aankhon waali hoorein unse biyah (marry) denge

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَٱتَّبَعَتۡهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ وَمَآ أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءࣲۚ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيِٕۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينࣱ‏
t: Waallatheena amanoo waittabaAAathum thurriyyatuhum bieemanin alhaqna bihim thurriyyatahum wama alatnahum min AAamalihim min shayin kullu imriin bima kasaba raheenun
u: Jo log imaan laaye hain aur unki aulad bhi kisi darja-e-imaan mein unke naksh-e-qadam par chali hai unki us aulad ko bhi hun (jannat mein) unke saath mila denge aur unke amaal mein koi ghaata(loss) unko na denge. Har shaks apne kasb ke aevaz rehan hai.( Every person is pledged to what he did)
Hum unko har tarah ke phal (fruits) aur gosht , jis cheez ko bhi unka ji chahega khoob diye chale jayenge

ar: يَتَنَٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأۡسࣰ ا لَّا لَغۡوࣱ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمࣱ‏
t: YatanazaAAoona feeha kasan la laghwun feeha wala tatheemun
u: Wahan woh ek dusre se jaam-e-sharaab lapak lapak kar le rahey hongey jis mein na yawa-goyi (ill speech) hogi na bad-kirdari

ar: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ غِلۡمَانࣱ لَّهُمۡ كَأَنَّهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤࣱ مَّكۡنُونࣱ‏
t: Wayatoofu AAalayhim ghilmanun lahum kaannahum luluon maknoonun
u: Aur unki khidmat mein woh ladke daudte (running) phir rahey hongey jo unhi ke liye makhsoos hongey, aisey khoobsurat jaise chupa kar rakkhe huey moti(pearls)
Yeh log apas mein ek dusre se (duniya mein guzre huey) halaat puchenge

ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبۡلُ فِيٓ أَهۡلِنَا مُشۡفِقِينَ
t: Qaloo inna kunna qablu fee ahlina mushfiqeena
u: Yeh kahenge ke hum pehle apne ghar waalon mein darte huey zindagi basar karte thay

ar: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
t: Famanna Allahu AAalayna wawaqana AAathaba alssamoomi
u: Aakhir e kaar Allah ne hum par fazl farmaya aur humein jhulsa dene wali hawa ke azaab se bacha liya

ar: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبۡلُ نَدۡعُوهُۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
t: Inna kunna min qablu nadAAoohu innahu huwa albarru alrraheemu
u: Hum pichli zindagi mein usi se duaein maangte thay, woh waqai bada hi Mohsin (beneficent) aur Raheem hai

ar: فَذَكِّرۡ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنࣲ وَلَا مَجۡنُونٍ
t: Fathakkir fama anta biniAAmati rabbika bikahin wala majnoonin
u: Pas aey nabi, tum nasihat kiye jao, apne Rubb ke fazal se na tum kaahin (soothsayer) ho aur na majnoon (madman)

ar: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرࣱ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيۡبَ ٱلۡمَنُونِ
t: Am yaqooloona shaAAirun natarabbasu bihi rayba almanooni
u: Kya yeh log kehte hain ke yeh shaks shayar hai jiske haqq mein hum gardish-e-ayyam (misfortune) ke intizaar kar rahe hain

ar: قُلۡ تَرَبَّصُواْ فَإِنِّي مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
t: Qul tarabbasoo fainnee maAAakum mina almutarabbiseena
u: Inse kaho, accha intizaar karo, main bhi tumhare saath intizaar karta hoon

ar: أَمۡ تَأۡمُرُهُمۡ أَحۡلَٰمُهُم بِهَٰذَآۚ أَمۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمࣱ طَاغُونَ
t: Am tamuruhum ahlamuhum bihatha am hum qawmun taghoona
u: Kya inki aqalein(minds) inhein aisi hi baatein karne ke liye kehti hain? Ya dar-haqeeqat yeh inaad (transgression)mein hadd se guzare huey log hain

ar: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥۚ بَل لَّا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
t: Am yaqooloona taqawwalahu bal la yuminoona
u: Kya ye kehte hain ke is shaks ne yeh quraan khud ghad (invented/fabricated) liya hai? Asal baat yeh hai ke yeh imaan nahin lana chahte

ar: فَلۡيَأۡتُواْ بِحَدِيثࣲ مِّثۡلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُواْ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Falyatoo bihadeethin mithlihi in kanoo sadiqeena
u: Agar yeh apne is qaul (saying) mein sacche hain to isi shaan ka ek kalaam bana layein

ar: أَمۡ خُلِقُواْ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ شَيۡءٍ أَمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰلِقُونَ
t: Am khuliqoo min ghayri shayin am humu alkhaliqoona
u: Kya yeh kisi khaliq ke bagair khud paida ho gaye hain? Ya yeh khud apne khaliq hain

ar: أَمۡ خَلَقُواْ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
t: Am khalaqoo alssamawati waalarda bal la yooqinoona
u: Ya zameen aur aasmaano ko inhon ne paida kiya hai? Asal baat yeh hai ke yeh yaqeen nahin rakhte

ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡمُصَۜيۡطِرُونَ
t: Am AAindahum khazainu rabbika am humu almusaytiroona
u: Kya tere Rubb ke khazane in ke kabze mein hain? Ya un par inhi ka hukum chalta hai

ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ سُلَّمࣱ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ فِيهِۖ فَلۡيَأۡتِ مُسۡتَمِعُهُم بِسُلۡطَٰنࣲ مُّبِينٍ
t: Am lahum sullamun yastamiAAoona feehi falyati mustamiAAuhum bisultanin mubeenin
u: Kya inke paas koi seedi(ladder) hai jispar chadh kar yeh ilm-e-baala ki sun-gun letey hain? In mein se jisne sun-gun li ho woh laaye ko khuli daleel
Kya Allah ke liye to hain betiyan aur tum logon ke liye hain betay (sons)

ar: أَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ أَجۡرࣰ ا فَهُم مِّن مَّغۡرَمࣲ مُّثۡقَلُونَ
t: Am tasaluhum ajran fahum min maghramin muthqaloona
u: Kya tum insey koi ajar maangte ho key eh zabardasti padi hui chatti ke bojh taley dabey jatey hain (burdened with a load of debt)
Kya inke paas gaib ke haqaiq ka ilm hai ke uski bina par yeh likh rahe hoon

ar: أَمۡ يُرِيدُونَ كَيۡدࣰ اۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡمَكِيدُونَ
t: Am yureedoona kaydan faallatheena kafaroo humu almakeedoona
u: Kya yeh koi chaal chalna chahte hain? (agar yeh baat hai) to kufr karne walon par in ki chaal ulti hi padegi

ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ إِلَٰهٌ غَيۡرُ ٱللَّهِۚ سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
t: Am lahum ilahun ghayru Allahi subhana Allahi AAamma yushrikoona
u: Kya Allah ke siwa yeh koi aur maabood rakhte hain? Allah paak hai us shirk se jo yeh log kar rahey hain

ar: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ كِسۡفࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطࣰ ا يَقُولُواْ سَحَابࣱ مَّرۡكُومࣱ‏
t: Wain yaraw kisfan mina alssamai saqitan yaqooloo sahabun markoomun
u: Yeh log aasmaan ke tukde bhi girte huye dekh lein to kahenge yeh baadal hain jo umdey chale aa rahe hain

ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي فِيهِ يُصۡعَقُونَ
t: Fatharhum hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee feehi yusAAaqoona
u: Pas aey nabi, inhein inke haal par chodh do yahan tak ke yeh apne us din ko pahunch jayein jismein yeh maar giraye jayenge

ar: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُمۡ كَيۡدُهُمۡ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
t: Yawma la yughnee AAanhum kayduhum shayan wala hum yunsaroona
u: Jis din na inki apni koi chaal inke kisi kaam aayegi na koi inki madad ko aayega

ar: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ عَذَابࣰ ا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Wainna lillatheena thalamoo AAathaban doona thalika walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona
u: Aur us waqt ke aane se pehle bhi zalimon ke liye ek azaab hai, magar in mein se aksar jaante nahin hain

ar: وَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَاۖ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
t: Waisbir lihukmi rabbika fainnaka biaAAyunina wasabbih bihamdi rabbika heena taqoomu
u: Aey Nabi , apne Rubb ka faisla aane tak sabr karo. Tum hamari nigaah mein ho. Tum jab utho to apne Rubb ki hamd ke saath uski tasbeeh karo
Raat ko bhi uski tasbeeh kiya karo aur sitare jab palat-te hain us waqt bhi
Kasam hai taare ki jabke woh guroob hua
Tumhara rafeeq(companion) na bhatka hai na behka(deluded) hai
Woh apni khwaish-e-nafs se nahin bolta
Yeh to ek wahee (Inspiration /revelation) hai jo uspar nazil ki jati hai
Usey zabardast quwwat waley ne taleem di hai
Jo bada sahib-e-hikmat hai
Woh saamne aa khada hua jabke woh balaii ufuq par tha(highest part of the horizon)
Phir kareeb aaya aur upar muallak ho gaya.(approached and descended)
Yahan tak ke do kamano (bow lengths) ke barabar ya issey kuch kam faasla reh gaya
Tab usne Allah ke banday ko wahee (revelation) pahunchayi jo wahee (revelation) bhi usey pahunchani thi
Nazar ne jo kuch dekha, dil ne usmein jhoot na milaya
Ab kya tum us cheez par ussey jhagadte ho jisey woh aankhon se dekhta hai
Aur ek martaba phir usney
Sidratul muntaha ke paas usko (Angel Gibriel) dekha
Jahan paas hi jannat-ul-maawa hai
Us waqt sidrah par chaa raha tha jo kuch ke chaa raha tha
Nigaah na chundhyayi (waver / swerve) na hadd se mutajawiz (transgress) hui

ar: لَقَدۡ رَأَىٰ مِنۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰٓ
t: Laqad raa min ayati rabbihi alkubra
u: Aur usney apne Rubb ki badi badi nishaniyan dekhi
Ab zara batao , tumne kabhi is Laat aur is Uzza (names of pagan idols)
Aur tisri (third) ek aur devi Manaat ki haqeeqat par kuch gaur bhi kiya
Kya betay (sons) tumhare liye hain aur betiyan (daughters) khuda ke liye
Yeh to badi dhandhli (unjust/unfair) ki taqseem hui

ar: إِنۡ هِيَ إِلَّآ أَسۡمَآءࣱ سَمَّيۡتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلۡطَٰنٍۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهۡوَى ٱلۡأَنفُسُۖ وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ
t: In hiya illa asmaon sammaytumooha antum waabaokum ma anzala Allahu biha min sultanin in yattabiAAoona illa alththanna wama tahwa alanfusu walaqad jaahum min rabbihimu alhuda
u: Darasal yeh kuch nahin hain magar bas chandh naam jo tumne aur tumhare baap dada ne rakh liye hain. Allah ne inke liye koi sanad nazil nahin ki. Haqeeat yeh hai ke log mehez weham-o-gumaan ki pairvi kar rahey hain aur khwahishaat-e-nafs ke mureed bane huey hain, halanke unke Rubb ki taraf se unke paas hidayat aa chuki hai
Kya insaan jo kuch chaahe uske liye wahi haqq hai
Duniya aur aakhirat ka maalik to Allah hi hai

ar: ۞وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكࣲ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغۡنِي شَفَٰعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَن يَأۡذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرۡضَىٰٓ
t: Wakam min malakin fee alssamawati la tughnee shafaAAatuhum shayan illa min baAAdi an yathana Allahu liman yashao wayarda
u: Aasmano mein kitne hi farishte maujood hain, un ki shafaat (intercession) kuch bhi kaam nahin aa sakti jab tak ke Allah kisi aisey shaks ke haqq mein uski ijazat na dey jiske liye woh koi arzdaasht (plea) sunna chahe aur usko pasand karey

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ تَسۡمِيَةَ ٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
t: Inna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati layusammoona almalaikata tasmiyata alontha
u: Magar jo log aakhirat ko nahin maante woh farishton ko deviyon (godess) ke naamo se mausoom karte hain

ar: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا
t: Wama lahum bihi min AAilmin in yattabiAAoona illa alththanna wainna alththanna la yughnee mina alhaqqi shayan
u: Halaanke is maamle ka koi ilm (knowledge) unhein haasil nahin hai. Woh mehez gumaan ki pairvi kar rahey hain, aur gumaan haqq ki jagah kuch bhi kaam nahin de sakta

ar: فَأَعۡرِضۡ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكۡرِنَا وَلَمۡ يُرِدۡ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا
t: FaaAArid AAan man tawalla AAan thikrina walam yurid illa alhayata alddunya
u: Pas aey Nabi, jo shaks hamarey zikr se mooh pherta hai, aur duniya ki zindagi ke siwa jise kuch matloob nahin hai, usey uske haal par chodh do

ar: ذَٰلِكَ مَبۡلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعِلۡمِۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ
t: Thalika mablaghuhum mina alAAilmi inna rabbaka huwa aAAlamu biman dalla AAan sabeelihi wahuwa aAAlamu bimani ihtada
u: In logon ka mablag-e-ilm (utmost of their knowledge) bas yahi kuch hai, yeh baat tera Rubb hi zyada jaanta hai ke uske raaste se kaun bhatak gaya hai aur kaun seedhe raaste par hai

ar: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ لِيَجۡزِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَٰٓـُٔواْ بِمَا عَمِلُواْ وَيَجۡزِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحۡسَنُواْ بِٱلۡحُسۡنَى
t: Walillahi ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi liyajziya allatheena asaoo bima AAamiloo wayajziya allatheena ahsanoo bialhusna
u: Aur zameen aur aasmaano ki har cheez ka maalik Allah hi hai. Taa-ke Allah burayi karne waalon ko unke amal ka badla de aur un logon ko acchi jaza se nawaze jinhon ne neik rawayya ikhtiyar kiya hai

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِۚ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِكُمۡ إِذۡ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِذۡ أَنتُمۡ أَجِنَّةࣱ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمۡۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡۖ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
t: Allatheena yajtaniboona kabaira alithmi waalfawahisha illa allamama inna rabbaka wasiAAu almaghfirati huwa aAAlamu bikum ith anshaakum mina alardi waith antum ajinnatun fee butooni ommahatikum fala tuzakkoo anfusakum huwa aAAlamu bimani ittaqa
u: Jo badey badey gunahon aur khule khule qabeeh afaal (shameful deeds) se parheiz karte hain, illa yeh ke kuch kasoor unse sarzad ho jaye. Bila shubhah tere Rubb ka daaman-e-magfirat bahut waseeh hai. Woh tumhein us waqt se khoob jaanta hai jab usne zameen se tumhein paida kiya, aur jab tum apni maaon (mothers) ke paiton (wombs) mein abhi janin (fetuses) hi thay. Pas apne nafs ki paaki ke daawe na karo. Wahi behtar jaanta hai ke waqai muttaqi kaun hai
Phir aey Nabi, tumne us shaks ko bhi dekha jo raah-e-khuda se phir gaya
Aur thoda sa de kar ruk gaya
Kya uske paas gaib ka ilm hai ke woh haqeeqat ko dekh raha hai

ar: أَمۡ لَمۡ يُنَبَّأۡ بِمَا فِي صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
t: Am lam yunabba bima fee suhufi moosa
u: Kya usey un baaton ki koi khabar nahin pahunchi jo moosa ke sahifon
Aur us Ibrahim ke sahifon mein bayan hui hai jisne wafa ka haqq ada kar diya
Yeh ke koi bojh uthane wala dusre ka bojh nahin uthayega

ar: وَأَن لَّيۡسَ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
t: Waan laysa lilinsani illa ma saAAa
u: Aur yeh ke Insaan ke liye kuch nahin hai magar woh jiski usne saii(koshish /Strive) ki hai
Aur yeh ke uski saii (koshih/strive/effort) anqareeb dekhi jayegi
Aur uski puri jaza use di jayegi
Aur yeh ke aakhir-e-kaar pahunchna tere Rubb hi ke paas hai
Aur yeh ke usi ne hasaya aur usi ne rulaya
Aur yeh ke usi ne maut di aur usi ne zindagi bakshi
Aur yeh ke usi ne narr (male) aur maada (female) ka joda paida kiya
Ek boond (sperm-drop) se jab woh tapkayi jati hai
Aur yeh ke dusri zindagi bakshna bhi usi ke zimme hai
Aur yeh ke usi ne gani (enriches) kiya aur jaidad bakshi
Aur yeh ke wahi sheraa (Sirius / mighty star) ka Rubb hai
Aur yeh ke usi ne Aad-e-oola (people of Aad) ko halaak kiya
Aur samood ko aisa mitaya ke unmein se kisi ko baaki na choda

ar: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحࣲ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ هُمۡ أَظۡلَمَ وَأَطۡغَىٰ
t: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo hum athlama waatgha
u: Aur unse pehle qaum-e-Nooh ko tabaah kiya kyunke woh thay hi sakht zaalim-o-sarkash log
Aur aundhi girne wali bastiyon ko utha phenka. (Qaum-e-Lut)
Phir chaa diya unpar woh kuch jo (tum jaante hi ho ke) kya chaa diya
Pas aey mukhatib, apne Rubb ki kin kin niyamaton mein tu shakk karega
Yeh ek tambeeh (warning) hai pehle aaye huye tambihaat(warnings) mein se
Aane wali ghadi qareeb aa lagi hai

ar: لَيۡسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
t: Laysa laha min dooni Allahi kashifatun
u: Allah ke siwa koi usko hatane wala nahin
Ab kya yahi woh baatein hain jinpar tum izhaar- e-taajub karte ho
Hanste(laugh) ho aur rotey (weep) nahin ho
Aur gaa (singing) bajaa kar inhein taalte ho
Jhuk jao Allah ke aagey aur bandagi baja laaoo (ayat-e-sajda)
Qayamat ki ghadi kareeb aa gayi aur chaand phatt (split) gaya

ar: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ ءَايَةࣰ يُعۡرِضُواْ وَيَقُولُواْ سِحۡرࣱ مُّسۡتَمِرࣱّ‏
t: Wain yaraw ayatan yuAAridoo wayaqooloo sihrun mustamirrun
u: Magar in logon ka haal yeh hai ke khwa koi nishani dekh lein mooh moadh jaatey hain aur kehte hain yeh to chalta hua jaadu hai

ar: وَكَذَّبُواْ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهۡوَآءَهُمۡۚ وَكُلُّ أَمۡرࣲ مُّسۡتَقِرࣱّ‏
t: Wakaththaboo waittabaAAoo ahwaahum wakullu amrin mustaqirrun
u: Inhon ne (isko bhi) jhutla diya aur apni khwahishat-e-nafs hi ki pairwi ki.Har maamlay ko Aakhir-e-kaar ek anjaam par pahunch kar rehna hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزۡدَجَرٌ
t: Walaqad jaahum mina alanbai ma feehi muzdajarun
u: In logon ke saamne (pichle qaumon ke) woh halaat aa chuke hain jinmein sarkashi se baaz rakhne ke liye kafi samaan-e-ibrat hai
Aur aisi hikmat jo nasihat ke maqsad ko ba-darja-e-atam (consummate wisdom) pura karti hain magar tambihat(warnings) in par kaargar nahin hoti

ar: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡۘ يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَيۡءࣲ نُّكُرٍ
t: Fatawalla AAanhum yawma yadAAu alddaAAi ila shayin nukurin
u: Pas aey Nabi, insey rukh pher lo. Jis roz pukarne wala ek sakht nagawaar cheez ki taraf pukarega

ar: خُشَّعًا أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمۡ جَرَادࣱ مُّنتَشِرࣱ‏
t: KhushshaAAan absaruhum yakhrujoona mina alajdathi kaannahum jaradun muntashirun
u: Log sehmi hui (down-cast) nigaahon ke saath apni qabraon se is tarah niklenge goya woh bikhri huyi tiddiyan (locusts) hain

ar: مُّهۡطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِۖ يَقُولُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَسِرࣱ‏
t: MuhtiAAeena ila alddaAAi yaqoolu alkafiroona hatha yawmun AAasirun
u: Pukarne wale ki taraf daudey jaa rahey hongey Aur wahi munkireen (jo duniya mein iska inkar karte thay)us waqt kahenge ke yeh din to bada kathin hai

ar: ۞كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحࣲ فَكَذَّبُواْ عَبۡدَنَا وَقَالُواْ مَجۡنُونࣱ وَٱزۡدُجِرَ
t: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin fakaththaboo AAabdana waqaloo majnoonun waizdujira
u: Insey pehle Nooh ki qaum jhutla chuki hai. Unhon ne hamare bandey ko jhoota karar diya aur kaha ke yeh deewana hai, aur woh buri tarah jhidka (rebuffed) gaya
Aakhir-e-kaar usne apne Rubb ko pukara ke “main magloob ho chuka , ab tu inse inteqam le”
Tab humne mausla-dhaar baarish se aasmaan ke darwaze khol diye aur zameen ko phaad kar chasmon mein tabdeel kar diya

ar: وَفَجَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأَرۡضَ عُيُونࣰ ا فَٱلۡتَقَى ٱلۡمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمۡرࣲ قَدۡ قُدِرَ
t: Wafajjarna alarda AAuyoonan failtaqa almao AAala amrin qad qudira
u: Aur yeh saara paani us kaam ko pura karne ke liye mil gaya jo mukaddar ho chuka tha
Aur Nooh ko humne ek takhaton(planks) aur keelon (nails) wali par sawar kar diya

ar: تَجۡرِي بِأَعۡيُنِنَا جَزَآءࣰ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
t: Tajree biaAAyunina jazaan liman kana kufira
u: Jo hamari nigrani mein chal rahi thi .yeh tha badla us shaks ki khatir jiski na-qadri ki gayi thi

ar: وَلَقَد تَّرَكۡنَٰهَآ ءَايَةࣰ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
t: Walaqad taraknaha ayatan fahal min muddakirin
u: Us kashti ko humne ek nishani bana kar chodh diya, phir koi hai nasihat qabool karne wala
Dekhlo, kaisa tha mera azaab aur kaisi thi meri tambihaat (warnings)

ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
t: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
u: Humne is Quran ko nasihat ke liye aasaan zariya bana diya hai, phir kya hai koi nasihat qabool karne wala

ar: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادࣱ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
t: Kaththabat AAadun fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri
u: Aad ne jhutlaya, to dekhlo ke kaisa tha mera azaab aur kaisi thi meri tambihaat (warnings)

ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيحࣰ ا صَرۡصَرࣰ ا فِي يَوۡمِ نَحۡسࣲ مُّسۡتَمِرࣲّ‏
t: Inna arsalna AAalayhim reehan sarsaran fee yawmi nahsin mustamirrin
u: Humne ek paiham nahusat (unremitting misfortune) ke din sakht toofani hawa unpar bhej di jo logon ko utha utha kar is tarah phenk rahi thi

ar: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلࣲ مُّنقَعِرࣲ‏
t: TanziAAu alnnasa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin munqaAAirin
u: Jaise woh jadd (roots) se ukhade huey khajoor ke taney (trunks) hon
Pas dekhlo ke kaisa tha mera azaab aur kaisi thi meri tambihaat (warnings)

ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
t: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
u: Humne is Quran ko nasihat ke liye aasaan zariya bana diya hai, phir kya hai koi nasihat qabool karne wala
Samood ne tambihaat ko jhutlaya

ar: فَقَالُوٓاْ أَبَشَرࣰ ا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدࣰ ا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذࣰ ا لَّفِي ضَلَٰلࣲ وَسُعُرٍ
t: Faqaloo abasharan minna wahidan nattabiAAuhu inna ithan lafee dalalin wasuAAurin
u: Aur kehne lagey “Ek akela aadmi jo hum hi mein se hai kya ab hum uske peechey chalein? Iska ittibaah hum qabool karlein to iske maani yeh hongey ke hum behak gaye hain aur hamari aqal maari gayi hai

ar: أَءُلۡقِيَ ٱلذِّكۡرُ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَا بَلۡ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرࣱ‏
t: Aolqiya alththikru AAalayhi min baynina bal huwa kaththabun ashirun
u: Kya hamare darmiyan bas yahi ek shaks tha jispar khuda ka zikr nazil kiya gaya? nahin, balke yeh parle darje ka jhoota aur bar-khud galat (insolent liar)hai”

ar: سَيَعۡلَمُونَ غَدࣰ ا مَّنِ ٱلۡكَذَّابُ ٱلۡأَشِرُ
u: (Humne apne paigambar se kaha) “ Kal hi inhein maaloom hua jata hai ke kaun parle darje ka jhoota aur bar khud galat hai

ar: إِنَّا مُرۡسِلُواْ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتۡنَةࣰ لَّهُمۡ فَٱرۡتَقِبۡهُمۡ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ
t: Inna mursiloo alnnaqati fitnatan lahum fairtaqibhum waistabir
u: Hum ountni (she-camel) ko inke liye fitna bana kar bhej rahe hain, ab zara sabr ke saath dekh ke inka kya anjaam hota hai

ar: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ أَنَّ ٱلۡمَآءَ قِسۡمَةُۢ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ كُلُّ شِرۡبࣲ مُّحۡتَضَرࣱ‏
t: Wanabbihum anna almaa qismatun baynahum kullu shirbin muhtadarun
u: Inko jata de ke paani inke aur ountni(she-camel) ke darmiyaan takseem hoga aur har ek apni baari ke din paani par aayega”
Aakhir-e-kaar un logon ne apne aadmi ko pukara aur usne is kaam ka beda uthaya aur ountni (she-camel) ko maar dala
Phir dekh lo ke kaisa tha mera azaab aur kaisi thi meri tambeehat (warnings)

ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ فَكَانُواْ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلۡمُحۡتَظِرِ
t: Inna arsalna AAalayhim sayhatan wahidatan fakanoo kahasheemi almuhtathiri
u: Humne unpar bas ek hi dhamaka chodha aur woh baade wale ki rondhi hui baad ke taraah bhus ho kar reh gaya. (Lo! We sent upon them one Shout, and they became as the dry twigs (rejected by) the builder of a cattle-fold

ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
t: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
u: Humne is Quran ko nasihat ke liye aasaan zariya bana diya hai, ab hai koi nasihat qabool karne wala
Lut ki qaum ne tambihat ko jhutlaya

ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطࣲۖ نَّجَّيۡنَٰهُم بِسَحَرࣲ‏
t: Inna arsalna AAalayhim hasiban illa ala lootin najjaynahum bisaharin
u: Aur humne pattharao karne wali hawa is par bhej di. Sirf Lut ke ghar wale ussey mehfooz rahe

ar: نِّعۡمَةࣰ مِّنۡ عِندِنَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي مَن شَكَرَ
t: NiAAmatan min AAindina kathalika najzee man shakara
u: Unko humne apne fazl se raat ke pichle pehar bacha kar nikal diya. Yeh jaza dete hai hum har us shaks ko jo shukar guzar hota hai
Lut ne apni qaum ke logon ko hamari pakad se khabardaar kiya magar woh saari tambihat ko mashkuk (doubtful) samajh kar baaton mein udate rahey

ar: وَلَقَدۡ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيۡفِهِۦ فَطَمَسۡنَآ أَعۡيُنَهُمۡ فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
t: Walaqad rawadoohu AAan dayfihi fatamasna aAAyunahum fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri
u: Phir unhon ne usey apne mehmano ki hifazat se baaz rakhne ki koshish ki. Aakhir-e-kaar humne unki aankhein moond-di (blinded), ke chakkho ab mera azaab aur meri tambihaat ka maza
Subah sawerey hi ek atal azaab ne unko aa liya
Chakkho mazaa ab mere azaab ka aur meri tambihaat ka

ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
t: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
u: Humne is Quran ko nasihat ke liye aasaan zariya bana diya hai, pas hai koi nasihat qabool karne wala
Aur aal-e-Firoun ke paas bhi tambihaat aayi thi

ar: كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ أَخۡذَ عَزِيزࣲ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ
t: Kaththaboo biayatina kulliha faakhathnahum akhtha AAazeezin muqtadirin
u: Magar unhon ne hamari saari nishaniyon ko jhutla diya. Aakhir ko humne unhein pakda jis taraah koi zabardast qudrat wala pakadta hai

ar: أَكُفَّارُكُمۡ خَيۡرࣱ مِّنۡ أُوْلَٰٓئِكُمۡ أَمۡ لَكُم بَرَآءَةࣱ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
t: Akuffarukum khayrun min olaikum am lakum baraatun fee alzzuburi
u: Kya tumhare kuffar kuch un logon se behtar hain? Ya aasmani kitaabon mein tumhare liye koi maafi likhi hui hai
Ya in logon ka kehna yeh hai ke hum ek mazboot jattha (jamaat) hain, apna bachao kar lengey
Ankareeb yeh jattha(jamaat) shikhast kha jayega aur yeh sab peeth pheir kar bhaagte nazar aayenge

ar: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوۡعِدُهُمۡ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدۡهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
t: Bali alssaAAatu mawAAiduhum waalssaAAatu adha waamarru
u: Balke insey nimatne ke liye asal waade ka waqt to qayamat hai aur woh badi aafat aur zyaada talkh-saa-at (badi sakht aur kadwi cheez) hai
Yeh mujrim log dar haqeeqat galat fehmi mein mubtala hain aur inki aqal maari gayi hai

ar: يَوۡمَ يُسۡحَبُونَ فِي ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمۡ ذُوقُواْ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
t: Yawma yushaboona fee alnnari AAala wujoohihim thooqoo massa saqara
u: Jis roz yeh mooh ke bal aag mein ghaseetey jayenge us roz insey kaha jayega ke ab chakkho jahannum ki lapat ka maza
Humne har cheez ek taqdeer ke saath paida ki hai

ar: وَمَآ أَمۡرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةࣱ كَلَمۡحِۭ بِٱلۡبَصَرِ
t: Wama amruna illa wahidatun kalamhin bialbasari
u: Aur hamara hukum bas ek hi hukum hota hai aur palak jhapakate (twinkling of an eye) woh amal mein aa jata hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَآ أَشۡيَاعَكُمۡ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
t: Walaqad ahlakna ashyaAAakum fahal min muddakirin
u: Tum jaisey bahut-soon ko hum halak kar chuke hain. Phir hai koi nasihat qabool karne wala
Jo kuch inhon ne kiya hai woh sab daftaron (office) mein darj hai
Aur har choti badi baat likhi hui maujood hai
Nafarmani se parhez karne waley yaqeenan baaghon aur neharon mein hongey

ar: فِي مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكࣲ مُّقۡتَدِرِۭ
t: Fee maqAAadi sidqin AAinda maleekin muqtadirin
u: Sacchi izzat ki jagah, badey zeeh-iqtedar baadshah ke kareeb
Rahman ne
Is Quran ki taleem di hai
Usi ne Insan ko paida kiya
Aur usey bolna sikhaya
Suraj aur chand ek hisaab ke paband hain
Aur taarey aur darakht sab sajda-reiz hain
Aasman ko usne buland kiya aur mizan qayam kardi
Iska taqaza yeh hai ke tum mizaan mein khalal na daalo

ar: وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلۡوَزۡنَ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِ وَلَا تُخۡسِرُواْ ٱلۡمِيزَانَ
t: Waaqeemoo alwazna bialqisti wala tukhsiroo almeezana
u: Insaaf ke saath theek theek tolo (weigh) aur tarazu mein dandi (skimp ) na maaro
Zameen ko usne sab makhlooqat (creatures) ke liye banaya
Usmein har tarah ke ba-kasrat laziz phal hain,khajoor ke darakht hain jinke phal ghilafon (sheaths) mein liptey huey hain
Tarah tarah ke galley(corn) hain jinmein bhusa bhi hota hai aur dana (grain) bhi
Pas aey jinn-o-Ins (insan), tum apne Rubb ki kin kin niyamaton ko jhutlaogey
Insan ko usne thikri (potter) jaise sukhey sadey (rotten) huey gaarey se banaya (clay like [that of] pottery

ar: وَخَلَقَ ٱلۡجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجࣲ مِّن نَّارࣲ‏
t: Wakhalaqa aljanna min marijin min narin
u: Aur Jinn ko aag ki lapat se paida kiya
Pas aey Jinn-o-Ins (insan), tum apne Rubb ke kin kin ajaib-e-qudrat ko jhutlaogey
Dono mashriq aur dono magrib, Sab ka maalik-o-parwardigar wahi hai
Pas aey jinn-o-Ins, tum apne Rubb ke kin kin qudraton ko jhutlaogey
Do samandaron (seas) ko usne chodh diya ke baham mil jayein
Phir bhi unke darmiyan ek purdah hayal(barrier) hai jissey woh tajawuz (transgress) nahin karte
Pas aey jinn-o-Ins (insan), Tum apne Rubb ki qudrat ke kin kin karishmo ko jhutlaogey
In samandaron se Moti aur mongay (coral) nikalte hain
Pas aey jinn-o-Ins (insan), tum apne Rubb ki qudrat ke kin kin kamalaat ko jhutlaogey

ar: وَلَهُ ٱلۡجَوَارِ ٱلۡمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ كَٱلۡأَعۡلَٰمِ
t: Walahu aljawari almunshaatu fee albahri kaalaAAlami
u: Aur yeh jahaaz (ships) usi ke hain jo samandar mein pahadon (mountains) ki tarah unchey uthey huey hain
Pas aye jinn-o-Ins (insan), tum apne Rub ke kin kin ehsanaat ko jhutlaogey
Har cheez jo is zameen par hai fanaa (perish) ho janey wali hai

ar: وَيَبۡقَىٰ وَجۡهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ
t: Wayabqa wajhu rabbika thoo aljalali waalikrami
u: Aur sirf tere Rubb ki jalil-o-kareem zaat hi baaki rehne wali hai
Pas aey jinn-o-Ins (insan), tum apne Rubb ke qudraton ke kin kin kamalaat ko jhutlaogey

ar: يَسۡـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كُلَّ يَوۡمٍ هُوَ فِي شَأۡنࣲ‏
t: Yasaluhu man fee alssamawati waalardi kulla yawmin huwa fee shanin
u: Zameen aur Aasmano mein jo bhi hai sab apni haajatein (needs) usi se maang rahey hain, har aan woh nayi shaan mein hai
Pas aey jinn-o-Ins (insan), tum apne Rubb ki kin kin siffat-e-hameeda ko jhutlaogey
Aey zameen ke bojho(loads), ankareeb hum tumse baaz purs (questioning) karne ke liye faarig huey jatey hain
(phir dekh lenge ke) tum apne Rubb ke kin kin ehsanaat ko jhutlate ho

ar: يَٰمَعۡشَرَ ٱلۡجِنِّ وَٱلۡإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ أَن تَنفُذُواْ مِنۡ أَقۡطَارِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱنفُذُواْۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلۡطَٰنࣲ‏
t: Ya maAAshara aljinni waalinsi ini istataAAtum an tanfuthoo min aqtari alssamawati waalardi faonfuthoo la tanfuthoona illa bisultanin
u: Aey giroh-e-jinn-o-Ins(insan) , gar tum zameen aur aasmano ki sarhadon se nikal kar bhaag sakte ho to bhaag dekho , nahin bhaag sakte iske liye bada zoar chahiye
Apne Rubb ki kin kin qudraton ko tum jhutlaogey

ar: يُرۡسَلُ عَلَيۡكُمَا شُوَاظࣱ مِّن نَّارࣲ وَنُحَاسࣱ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
t: Yursalu AAalaykuma shuwathun min narin wanuhasun fala tantasirani
u: (Bhaagne ki koshish karogey to ) Tumpar aag ka shola aur dhoowan (smoke) chodh diya jayega jiska tum muqabla na kar sakogey
Pas aey Jinn-o-Ins (insan),tum apne Rubb ki kin kin qudraton ka inkar karogey

ar: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ وَرۡدَةࣰ كَٱلدِّهَانِ
t: Faitha inshaqqati alssamao fakanat wardatan kaalddihani
u: Phir (kya banegi us waqt) jab aasman phatega (split) aur laal chamdey (skin) ki tarah surkh (red) ho jayega
Aey Jinn-o-Ins (insan) (us waqt) tum apne Rubb ki kin kin qudraton ko jhutlaogey

ar: فَيَوۡمَئِذࣲ لَّا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسࣱ وَلَا جَآنࣱّ‏
t: Fayawmaithin la yusalu AAan thanbihi insun wala jannun
u: Us roz kisi Insan aur kisi Jinn se uska gunaah puchne ke zaroorat na hogi
Phir (dekh liya jayega ke) tum dono giroh apne Rubb ke kin kin ehsanaat ka inkar karte ho

ar: يُعۡرَفُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ بِسِيمَٰهُمۡ فَيُؤۡخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِي وَٱلۡأَقۡدَامِ
t: YuAArafu almujrimoona biseemahum fayukhathu bialnnawasee waalaqdami
u: Mujrim wahan apne chehron se pehchan liye jayenge aur unhein peshani ke baal aur paaon pakad pakad kar ghasita jayega
Us waqt tum apne Rub ki kin kin qudraton ko jhutlaogey

ar: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِي يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
t: Hathihi jahannamu allatee yukaththibu biha almujrimoona
u: (Us waqt kaha jayega) yeh wahi jahannum hai jisko mujrimeen jhoot karar diya karte thay
Usi jahannum aur khaulte (boiling) paani ke darmiyan woh gardish karte rahenge
Phir apne Rubb ki kin kin qudraton ko tum jhutlaogey
Aur har us shaks ke liye jo apne Rubb ke huzoor pesh hone ka khauf(darr) rakhta ho, do baagh (gardens) hain
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Hari bhari daaliyon se bharpur
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Dono baaghon(gardens) mein do chashmey (springs) rawan
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Dono baaghon(gardens) mein har phal ki do qismein
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey

ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشِۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنۡ إِسۡتَبۡرَقࣲۚ وَجَنَى ٱلۡجَنَّتَيۡنِ دَانࣲ‏
t: Muttakieena AAala furushin batainuha min istabraqin wajana aljannatayni danin
u: Jannati log aisey farshon par takiye laga ke baithenge jinke astar dabiz resham ( silk brocade) ke hongey, Aur baagon ki daliyan phalon se jhuki padh rahi hongi
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey

ar: فِيهِنَّ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ إِنسࣱ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنࣱّ‏
t: Feehinna qasiratu alttarfi lam yatmithhunna insun qablahum wala jannun
u: In niyamaton ke darmiyan sharmili nigahon waliyan hongi jinhein in jannatiyon se pehle kisi insaan ya Jinn ne chuwa na hoga
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Aisi khoobsurat jaisey hirey(diamonds) aur Moti
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Neki ka badla neki ke siwa aur kya ho sakta hai
Phir aey Jinn-o-Ins (Insan),apne Rubb ke kin kin awsaaf-e-hameeda ka tum inkar karogey
Aur un do baaghon ke alawa do baagh aur hongey
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Ghaney sar-sabz o shadaab baagh
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamat ko tum jhutlaogey
Dono baaghon mein do chashmey (springs) fawwaron ki tarah ubaltey (gushing) huey
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Un mein ba-kasrat phal aur khajurein aur anaar (pomegranates)
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
In niyamaton ke darmiyan khoob seerat aur khoobsurat biwiyan
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inamaat ko tum jhutlaogey
Kheymo (tents) mein theharayi hui hoorein (maidens)
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey

ar: لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ إِنسࣱ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنࣱّ‏
t: Lam yatmithhunna insun qablahum wala jannun
u: In jannatiyon se pehle kabhi kisi Insaan ya jinn ne unko na chuwa (touch) hoga
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey

ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفۡرَفٍ خُضۡرࣲ وَعَبۡقَرِيٍّ حِسَانࣲ‏
t: Muttakieena AAala rafrafin khudrin waAAabqariyyin hisanin
u: Woh jannati sabz-qaleeno (green cushions) aur nafees o nadir farshon (beautiful carpets) par takiye laga ke baithenge
Apne Rubb ke kin kin inaamaat ko tum jhutlaogey

ar: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱسۡمُ رَبِّكَ ذِي ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ
t: Tabaraka ismu rabbika thee aljalali waalikrami
u: Badi barkat wala hai tere Rubb-e-Jaleel-o-Kareem (Majesty and Glory) ka naam
Jab woh honay wala waqia pesh aa jayega
To koi uske waquh(occurrence) ko jhutlane wala na hoga
Woh tah-o-bala (pasth aur buland) kardene wali aafat hogi
Zameen us waqt ek baar hi hila daali jayegi
Aur pahad is tarah reza reza kardiye jayenge
Ke paraganda (scattered) gubar (dust) ban kar reh jayenge
Tum log us waqt teen girohon (jamaat) mein taqseem ho jaogey
Dayein bazu waley, so dayein bazu walon (ke khush-naseebi ) ka kya kehna
Aur bayein bazu waley, to bayein bazu walon (ki badnasibi ka) kya thikana
Aur aagey waley to phir aagey waley hi hain
Wahi to muqarrab (nearest to Allah) log hain
Niyamat bhari jannaton mein rahengey
Aglon mein se bahut hongey
Aur pichlon mein se kam
Murassasa takhaton par (On thrones decorated)
Takiye lagaye aamne saamne baithengey
Unki majlison mein abadi ladke sharab-e-chashma-e jaari se
Labrez pyale aur kantar (jugs) aur saagar liye daudte phirte hongey
Jisey pee kar na unka sar chakrayega na unki aqal mein fatur (drunkenness) aayega
Aur woh unke saamne tarah tarah ke lazeez phal (fruits) pesh karengey jisey chahe chun le
Aur parindon ke gosht pesh karenge ke jis parinde ka chahein istimal karein
Aur unke liye khubsurat aankhon wali hoorein hongi
Aisi haseen jaise chupa kar rakkhey huey moti
Yeh sab kuch un aamal ki jaza ke taur par unhein milega jo woh duniya mein karte rahe thay

ar: لَا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوࣰ ا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمًا
t: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala tatheeman
u: Wahan woh koi behuda kalaam ya gunah ki baat na sunengey

ar: إِلَّا قِيلࣰ ا سَلَٰمࣰ ا سَلَٰمࣰ ا
u: Jo baat bhi hogi theek theek hogi
Aur daayein bazu waley, daayein bazu walon ki khush nasibi ka kya kehna
Woh be-khaar (thornless) beriyon(lote trees)
Aur teh bar teh chadey huey kelon (bananas)
Aur door tak phayli hui chaaon (shadow)
Aur har dum rawan (gushing) paani
Aur kabhi khatam na honay waley
Aur bay rok-tok milne waley ba-kasrat phalon (fruits)
Aur unchi nishist gaahon (exalted thrones) mein hongay
Unki biwiyon ko hum khaas taur par naye sirey se paida karengey
Aur unhein bakira (virgins) bana dengey
Apne shoharon ki aashik aur umar mein humsin (equal age)
Yeh kuch daayein bazu walon ke liye hai
Woh aglon mein se bahut hongey
Aur pichlon mein se bhi bahut
Aur baayein (left) bazu wale, bayein bazu walon ki badnasibi ka kya puchna
Woh luu ki lapat (midst of scorching wind) aur khaulte (boiling) huey paani
Aur kaalay dhuwon (smoke) ke saaye mein hongey
Jo na thanda hoga na aaram de
Yeh woh log hongey jo is anjaam ko pahunchne se pehle khush haal thay
Aur gunaah-e-azeem par israr karte thay

ar: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ ا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ
t: Wakanoo yaqooloona aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona
u: Kehte thay “kya jab hum mar kar khaak ho jayengey aur haddiyon ka panjar reh jayengey to phir utha khadey kiye jayenge
Aur kya hamare woh baap dada bhi uthaye jayengey jo pehle guzar chuke hain?”
Aye Nabi in logon se kaho, yaqeenan agle aur pichle sab
Ek din zaroor jama kiye janey wale hain jiska waqt muqarrar kiya ja chuka hai
Phir aey gumrahon aur jhutlane walon
Tum shajar-e-zaqqum ki giza khane waley ho
Usi se tum pait bharogey
Aur upar se khaulta (boiling) hua paani
Toans (thirst) lagey huey ount (camel) ki tarah piogey
Yahi baayein walon ki ziyafat ka saamaan roz-e-jaza mein
Humne tumhein paida kiya hai phir kyun tasdeek (confirm) nahin karte
Kabhi tumne gaur kiya, yeh nutfa (sperm) jo tum daltey ho
Usse baccha tum banate ho ya uske banane wale hum hain

ar: نَحۡنُ قَدَّرۡنَا بَيۡنَكُمُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
t: Nahnu qaddarna baynakumu almawta wama nahnu bimasbooqeena
u: Humne tumharey darmiyan maut ko takseem kiya hai, aur hum issey aajiz nahin hai

ar: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمۡثَٰلَكُمۡ وَنُنشِئَكُمۡ فِي مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
t: AAala an nubaddila amthalakum wanunshiakum fee ma la taAAlamoona
u: Ke tumhari shaklein badal dein aur kisi aisi shakal mein tumhein paida kardein jisko tum nahin jante

ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
t: Walaqad AAalimtumu alnnashata aloola falawla tathakkaroona
u: Apni pehli paidaish ko to tum jante ho, phir kyun sabaq nahin letay
Kabhi tumne socha, yeh beej (seed) jo tum botey ho
Insey khetiyan tum ugatey ho ya unke ugane waley hum hain

ar: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ حُطَٰمࣰ ا فَظَلۡتُمۡ تَفَكَّهُونَ
t: Law nashao lajaAAalnahu hutaman fathaltum tafakkahoona
u: Hum chahein to un khetoun ko bhus (rubble) bana kar rakh dein aur tum tarah tarah ki baatein banate reh jao
Ke hum par to ulti chatti pad gayi (Lo! we are laden with debt)
Balke humarey to naseeb hi phootey huey hain
Kabhi tumne aankhein khol kar dekha, yeh paani jo tum peetey ho

ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنزَلۡتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُزۡنِ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنزِلُونَ
t: Aantum anzaltumoohu mina almuzni am nahnu almunziloona
u: Isey tumne baadal se barsaya hai ya iske barsane wale hum hain

ar: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ جَعَلۡنَٰهُ أُجَاجࣰ ا فَلَوۡلَا تَشۡكُرُونَ
t: Law nashao jaAAalnahu ojajan falawla tashkuroona
u: Hum chahein to isey sakht khari(bitter) bana kar rakh dein, phir kyun tum shukar guzar nahin hotey
Kabhi tumne khayal kiya, yeh aag jo tum sulgate ho

ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنشَأۡتُمۡ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنشِـُٔونَ
t: Aantum anshatum shajarataha am nahnu almunshioona
u: Iska darakht tum ne paida kiya hai ya iske paida karne wale hum hain

ar: نَحۡنُ جَعَلۡنَٰهَا تَذۡكِرَةࣰ وَمَتَٰعࣰ ا لِّلۡمُقۡوِينَ
u: Humne usko yaad-dihani(reminder) ka zariya aur haajat-mandon (needy) ke liye saaman-e-zeist (provision) banaya hai
Pas aey Nabi, apne Rubb-e-azeem ke naam ki tasbeeh karo
Pas nahin main kasam khata hoon taaron ke mawake (setting or the mansions, etc.) ki
Agar tum samjho to yeh bahut badi qasam hai
Ke yeh ek buland paya Quran hai
Ek mehfooz kitaab mein sabt (inscribed)
Jisey mutahreen (pure) ke siwa koi choo nahin sakta
Yeh Rubb-ul- Aalameen ka nazil karda hai
Phir kya is kalam ke saath tum be-atnayi (indifferent) barat-te ho
Aur is niyamat mein apna hissa tumne yeh rakkha hai ke isey jhutlate ho
To jab marne wale ki jaan halaq tak pahunch chuki hoti hai
Aur tum aankhon se dekh rahe hotey ho ke woh marr raha hai

ar: وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبۡصِرُونَ
t: Wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi minkum walakin la tubsiroona
u: Us waqt tumhare ba-nisbat hum uske zyada kareeb hotey hain magar tumko nazar nahin aatey
Ab agar tum kisi ke mahkoom(anyones authority) nahin ho aur apne is khayal mein sacchey ho
Us waqt uski nikalti hui jaan ko wapas kyun nahin ley aatey
Phir woh marne wala agar muqarrabin (near to Allah) mein se hon
To uske liye rahat aur umda rizq aur niyamat bhari jannat hai

ar: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
t: Waamma in kana min ashabi alyameeni
u: Aur agar woh ashaab-e-yameen mei se ho
To uska istaqbal (welcome) yun hota hai ke salaam hai tujhey, tu ashab-ul-yameen (People on the Right) mein se hai

ar: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
t: Waamma in kana mina almukaththibeena alddalleena
u: Aur agar woh jhutlane waley gumraah logon mein se ho
To uski tawazu ke liye khaulta (boiling) pani hai
Aur jahannum mein jhonka jaana
Yeh sab kuch qataii haqq hai
Pas aey Nabi apne Rubb-e-Azeem ke naam ki tasbeeh karo

ar: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
t: Sabbaha lillahi ma fee alssamawati waalardi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeemu
u: Allah ki tasbeeh ki hai har us cheez ne jo zameen aur aasmano mein hai, Aur wahi zabardast daana (wise) hai

ar: لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ يُحۡيِۦ وَيُمِيتُۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرٌ
t: Lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi yuhyee wayumeetu wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
u: Zameen aur aasmano ki sultanat ka maalik wahi hai, zindagi bakshta hai aur maut deta hai, aur har cheez par qudrat rakhta hai

ar: هُوَ ٱلۡأَوَّلُ وَٱلۡأٓخِرُ وَٱلظَّٰهِرُ وَٱلۡبَاطِنُۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٌ
t: Huwa alawwalu waalakhiru waalththahiru waalbatinu wahuwa bikulli shayin AAaleemun
u: Wahi awwal bhi hai aur aakhir bhi, aur zaahir bhi hai aur makhfi(hiddin) bhi , aur woh har cheez ka ilm rakhta hai

ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامࣲ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡعَرۡشِۖ يَعۡلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعۡرُجُ فِيهَاۖ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرࣱ‏
t: Huwa allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda fee sittati ayyamin thumma istawa AAala alAAarshi yaAAlamu ma yaliju fee alardi wama yakhruju minha wama yanzilu mina alssamai wama yaAAruju feeha wahuwa maAAakum ayna ma kuntum waAllahu bima taAAmaloona baseerun
u: Wahi hai jisne aasmano aur zameen ko chey (six) dino mein paida kiya aur phir arsh par jalwa farma hua. Uske ilm mein hai jo kuch zameen mein jata hai aur jo kuch ussey nikalta hai, aur jo kuch aasman se utarta hai aur jo kuch usmein chadhta hai. Woh tumhare saath hai jahan bhi tum ho. Jo kaam bhi karte ho usey woh dekh raha hai

ar: لَّهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرۡجَعُ ٱلۡأُمُورُ
t: Lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi waila Allahi turjaAAu alomooru
u: Wahi zameen aur aasmano ki baadshahi ka maalik hai aur tamaam maamlaat faisley ke liye usi ki taraf ruju kiye jatey hain

ar: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيۡلَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِي ٱلَّيۡلِۚ وَهُوَ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
t: Yooliju allayla fee alnnahari wayooliju alnnahara fee allayi wahuwa AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
u: Wahi raat ko din mein aur din ko raat mein daakhil karta hai, aur dilon ke chupey huye raaz tak janta hai

ar: ءَامِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُواْ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسۡتَخۡلَفِينَ فِيهِۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَأَنفَقُواْ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرࣱ كَبِيرࣱ‏
t: Aminoo biAllahi warasoolihi waanfiqoo mimma jaAAalakum mustakhlafeena feehi faallatheena amanoo minkum waanfaqoo lahum ajrun kabeerun
u: Iman lao Allah aur uske Rasool par aur kharch karo un cheezon mein se jinpar usney tumko khalifa banaya hai. Jo log tum mein se iman layenge aur maal kharch karenge unke liye bada ajr hai

ar: وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ أَخَذَ مِيثَٰقَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
t: Wama lakum la tuminoona biAllahi waalrrasoolu yadAAookum lituminoo birabbikum waqad akhatha meethaqakum in kuntum mumineena
u: Tumhein kya ho gaya hai ke tum Allah par iman nahin latey halanke Rasool tumhein apne Rubb par iman laney ki dawat de raha hai, aur woh tumse ahad (covenant) le chuka hai, agar tum waqayi maanne waley ho

ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦٓ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتࣲ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمۡ لَرَءُوفࣱ رَّحِيمࣱ‏
t: Huwa allathee yunazzilu AAala AAabdihi ayatin bayyinatin liyukhrijakum mina alththulumati ila alnnoori wainna Allaha bikum laraoofun raheemun
u: Woh Allah hi to hai jo apne banday par saaf saaf aayatein nazil kar raha hai taa-ke tumhein tareekhiyon (darkness) se nikal kar roshni mein le aaye. Aur haqeeat yeh hai ke Allah tumpar nihayat shafeeq aur meharbaan hai

ar: وَمَا لَكُمۡ أَلَّا تُنفِقُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ لَا يَسۡتَوِي مِنكُم مَّنۡ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبۡلِ ٱلۡفَتۡحِ وَقَٰتَلَۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَعۡظَمُ دَرَجَةࣰ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدُ وَقَٰتَلُواْۚ وَكُلࣰّ ا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرࣱ‏
t: Wama lakum alla tunfiqoo fee sabeeli Allahi walillahi meerathu alssamawati waalardi la yastawee minkum man anfaqa min qabli alfathi waqatala olaika aAAthamu darajatan mina allatheena anfaqoo min baAAdu waqataloo wakullan waAAada Allahu alhusna waAllahu bima taAAmaloona khabeerun
u: Aakhir kya wajah hai ke tum Allah ki raah mein kharch nahin karte halanke zameen aur aasmano ki miraas (inheritance) Allah hi ke liye hai. Tum mein se jo log fatah ke baad kharch aur jihad karenge woh kabhi un logon ke barabar nahin ho sakte jinhon ne fatah se pehle kharch aur jihad kiya hai.Unka darja baad mein kharch aur jihad karne walon se badh-kar hai hai agarche Allah ne dono hi se acchey waade famaye hain. Jo kuch tum karte ho Allah ussey ba-khabar hai

ar: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِي يُقۡرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنࣰ ا فَيُضَٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجۡرࣱ كَرِيمࣱ‏
t: Man tha allathee yuqridu Allaha qardan hasanan fayudaAAifahu lahu walahu ajrun kareemun
u: Kaun hai jo Allah ko qarz dey? Accha qarz taa-ke Allah usey kai gunaa bada kar wapas dey. Aur uske liye behtareen ajar hai

ar: يَوۡمَ تَرَى ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ يَسۡعَىٰ نُورُهُم بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَبِأَيۡمَٰنِهِمۖ بُشۡرَىٰكُمُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ جَنَّٰتࣱ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
t: Yawma tara almumineena waalmuminati yasAAa nooruhum bayna aydeehim wabiaymanihim bushrakumu alyawma jannatun tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha thalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu
u: Us din jabke tum momin mardon aur auraton ko dekhoge ke unka noor unke aagey aagey aur unke dayein jaanib daud raha hoga (unse kaha jayega ke) aaj basharat (khushkhabri) hai. Tumhare liye jannatein hongi jinke nichey nehrein beh rahi hongi, jin mein woh hamesha rahenge. Yahi hai badi kamiyabi

ar: يَوۡمَ يَقُولُ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقُونَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتُ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱنظُرُونَا نَقۡتَبِسۡ مِن نُّورِكُمۡ قِيلَ ٱرۡجِعُواْ وَرَآءَكُمۡ فَٱلۡتَمِسُواْ نُورࣰ اۖ فَضُرِبَ بَيۡنَهُم بِسُورࣲ لَّهُۥ بَابُۢ بَاطِنُهُۥ فِيهِ ٱلرَّحۡمَةُ وَظَٰهِرُهُۥ مِن قِبَلِهِ ٱلۡعَذَابُ
t: Yawma yaqoolu almunafiqoona waalmunafiqatu lillatheena amanoo onthuroona naqtabis min noorikum qeela irjiAAoo waraakum failtamisoo nooran faduriba baynahum bisoorin lahu babun batinuhu feehi alrrahmatu wathahiruhu min qibalihi alAAathabu
u: Us roz munafik mardon aur auraton ka haal yeh hoga ke woh momino se kahenge zara hamari taraf dekho taa-ke hum tumhare noor se kuch fayda uthayein. Magar unse kaha jayega pichey hatt jao, Apna noor kahin aur talash karo. Phir unke darmiyan ek deewar hayal kardi jayegi jismein ek darwaza hoga us darwaze ke andar rehmat hogi aur bahar azaab

ar: يُنَادُونَهُمۡ أَلَمۡ نَكُن مَّعَكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنَّكُمۡ فَتَنتُمۡ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَتَرَبَّصۡتُمۡ وَٱرۡتَبۡتُمۡ وَغَرَّتۡكُمُ ٱلۡأَمَانِيُّ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَ أَمۡرُ ٱللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡغَرُورُ
t: Yunadoonahum alam nakun maAAakum qaloo bala walakinnakum fatantum anfusakum watarabbastum wairtabtum wagharratkumu alamaniyyu hatta jaa amru Allahi wagharrakum biAllahi algharooru
u: Woh momino se pukar pukar kar kahenge kya hum tumhare saath na thay? Momin jawab dengey haan, magar tumne apne aap ko khud fitne mein dala, mauqa parasti ki, shakk mein padey rahey, aur jhooti tawakkuat (expectations) tumhein fareb deti rahi Yahan tak ke Allah ka faisla aa gaya. Aur aakhri waqt tak woh bada dhoke baaz tumhein Allah ke maamle mein dhoka deta raha

ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ لَا يُؤۡخَذُ مِنكُمۡ فِدۡيَةࣱ وَلَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۚ مَأۡوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُۖ هِيَ مَوۡلَىٰكُمۡۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
t: Faalyawma la yukhathu minkum fidyatun wala mina allatheena kafaroo mawakumu alnnaru hiya mawlakum wabisa almaseeru
u: Lihaza aaj na tumse koi fidiya kabool kiya jayega aur na un logon se jinhon ne khula khula kufr kiya tha. Tumhara thikana jahannum hai. Wahi tumhari khabar-giri karne wali hai aur yeh badtareen anjaam hai

ar: ۞أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
t: Alam yani lillatheena amanoo an takhshaAAa quloobuhum lithikri Allahi wama nazala mina alhaqqi wala yakoonoo kaallatheena ootoo alkitaba min qablu fatala AAalayhimu alamadu faqasat quloobuhum wakatheerun minhum fasiqoona
u: Kya iman laney walon ke liye abhi woh waqt nahin aaya ke unke dil Allah ke zikr se pighlein aur uske nazil karda haqq ke aagey jhukein aur woh un logon ki tarah na ho jayein jinhein pehle kitaab di gayi thi, phir ek lambi muddat unpar guzar gayi to unke dil sakht ho gaye aur aaj unmein se aksar fasiq banay huey hain

ar: ٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحۡيِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ قَدۡ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُونَ
t: IAAlamoo anna Allaha yuhyee alarda baAAda mawtiha qad bayyanna lakumu alayati laAAallakum taAAqiloona
u: Khoob jaan lo ke Allah zameen ko uski maut ke baad zindagi bakshta hai, humne nishaniyan tumko saaf saaf dikha di hai, shayad ke tum aqal se kaam lo

ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَّدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنࣰ ا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمۡ وَلَهُمۡ أَجۡرࣱ كَرِيمࣱ‏
t: Inna almussaddiqeena waalmussaddiqati waaqradoo Allaha qardan hasanan yudaAAafu lahum walahum ajrun kareemun
u: Mardon aur auraton mein se jo log sadaqaat (charity) dene waley hain aur jinhon ne Allah ko karz-e-hasan diya hai, unko yakeenan kayi gunaa bada kar diya jayega aur unke liye behtareen ajar hai

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦٓ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَۖ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءُ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرُهُمۡ وَنُورُهُمۡۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَكَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
t: Waallatheena amanoo biAllahi warusulihi olaika humu alssiddeeqoona waalshshuhadao AAinda rabbihim lahum ajruhum wanooruhum waallatheena kafaroo wakaththaboo biayatina olaika ashabu aljaheemi
u: Aur jo log Allah aur uske Rasoolon par iman laye hain wahi apne Rubb ke nazdeek siddiq aur shaheed hain. Unke liye unka ajar aur unka noor hai. Aur jin logon ne kufr kiya hai aur hamari aayat ko jhutlaya hai woh dozakhi hai

ar: ٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَا لَعِبࣱ وَلَهۡوࣱ وَزِينَةࣱ وَتَفَاخُرُۢ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَتَكَاثُرࣱ فِي ٱلۡأَمۡوَٰلِ وَٱلۡأَوۡلَٰدِۖ كَمَثَلِ غَيۡثٍ أَعۡجَبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصۡفَرࣰّ ا ثُمَّ يَكُونُ حُطَٰمࣰ اۖ وَفِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ عَذَابࣱ شَدِيدࣱ وَمَغۡفِرَةࣱ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنࣱۚ وَمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَآ إِلَّا مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡغُرُورِ
t: IAAlamoo annama alhayatu alddunya laAAibun walahwun wazeenatun watafakhurun baynakum watakathurun fee alamwali waalawladi kamathali ghaythin aAAjaba alkuffara nabatuhu thumma yaheeju fatarahu musfarran thumma yakoonu hutaman wafee alakhirati AAathabun shadeedun wamaghfiratun mina Allahi waridwanun wama alhayatu alddunya illa mataAAu alghuroori
u: Khoob jaan lo ke yeh duniya ki zindagi iske siwa kuch nahin ke ek khel aur dil-lagi aur zaahiri tip top aur tumhara aapas mein ek dusre par fakr jatana aur maal-o-aulad mein ek dusre se badh janey ki koshish karna hai.Iski misal aisi hai jaise ek baarish ho gayi to usse paida honay wali nabataat(vegetation) ko dekh kar kaasht-kaar (kisan) khush ho gaye. Phir wahi kheti pak jati hai aur tum dekhte ho ke woh zard (yellow) ho gayi phir woh bhus (chura chura /crumble) bankar reh jati hai. Iske baraks aakhirat woh jagah hai jahan sakht azaab hai aur Allah ki magfirat aur uski khushnudi hai. Dunkya ki zindagi ek dhoke ke tatti (means of deception) ke siwa kuch nahin

ar: سَابِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَغۡفِرَةࣲ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرۡضُهَا كَعَرۡضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ أُعِدَّتۡ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضۡلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤۡتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلۡفَضۡلِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
t: Sabiqoo ila maghfiratin min rabbikum wajannatin AAarduha kaAAardi alssamai waalardi oAAiddat lillatheena amanoo biAllahi warusulihi thalika fadlu Allahi yuteehi man yashao waAllahu thoo alfadli alAAatheemi
u: Daudo (race) aur ek dusrey se aage badhne ki koshish karo apne Rubb ki magfirat aur uski jannat ki taraf jiski wussat (width) aasman-o-zameen jaisi hai. Jo muhayya ki gayi hai un logon ke liye jo Allah aur uske Rasoolon par iman laye hon. Yeh Allah ka fazl hai, jisey chahta hai ata farmata hai, aur Allah badey fazl wala hai

ar: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةࣲ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا فِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡ إِلَّا فِي كِتَٰبࣲ مِّن قَبۡلِ أَن نَّبۡرَأَهَآۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرࣱ‏
t: Ma asaba min museebatin fee alardi wala fee anfusikum illa fee kitabin min qabli an nabraaha inna thalika AAala Allahi yaseerun
u: Koi museebat aisi nahin hai jo zameen mein ya tumhare apne nafs par nazil hoti ho aur humne usko paida karne se pehle ek kitaab mein likh na rakkha ho. Aisa karna Allah ke liye bahut aasaan kaam hai

ar: لِّكَيۡلَا تَأۡسَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُواْ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمۡۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالࣲ فَخُورٍ
t: Likayla tasaw AAala ma fatakum wala tafrahoo bima atakum waAllahu la yuhibbu kulla mukhtalin fakhoorin
u: (Yeh sab kuch isliye hai) taa-ke jo kuch bhi nuksaan tumhein ho us par tum dil-shikasta (grieve) na hon aur jo kuch Allah tumhein ata farmaye uspar phool na jao. Allah aisey logon ko pasand nahin karta jo apne aap ko badi cheez samajhte hain aur fakr jatate hain

ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبۡخَلُونَ وَيَأۡمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلۡبُخۡلِۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡغَنِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
t: Allatheena yabkhaloona wayamuroona alnnasa bialbukhli waman yatawalla fainna Allaha huwa alghaniyyu alhameedu
u: Jo khud bukhl (niggard/kanjusi) karte hain aur dusron ko bukhl par uksate hain. Ab agar koi ru-gardani (mooh pherna) karta hai to Allah be-niyaz aur satoda siffat (immensely praiseworthy) hai

ar: لَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَٱلۡمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِۖ وَأَنزَلۡنَا ٱلۡحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأۡسࣱ شَدِيدࣱ وَمَنَٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعۡلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيزࣱ‏
t: Laqad arsalna rusulana bialbayyinati waanzalna maAAahumu alkitaba waalmeezana liyaqooma alnnasu bialqisti waanzalna alhadeeda feehi basun shadeedun wamanafiAAu lilnnasi waliyaAAlama Allahu man yansuruhu warusulahu bialghaybi inna Allaha qawiyyun AAazeezun
u: Humne apne Rasoolon ko saaf saaf nishaniyon aur hidayaat ke saath bheja, aur unke saath kitaab aur mizaan (balance) nazil ki taakay log insaf par qayam hon. Aur loha (Iron) utara jis mein bada zoar hai aur logon ke liye munafa hai. Yeh isliye kiya gaya hai ke Allah ko maloom ho jaye ke kaun usko dekhe bagair uski aur uske rasoolon ki madad karta hai. Yaqeenan Allah badi quwwat wala aur zabardast hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحࣰ ا وَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلۡكِتَٰبَۖ فَمِنۡهُم مُّهۡتَدࣲۖ وَكَثِيرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
t: Walaqad arsalna noohan waibraheema wajaAAalna fee thurriyyatihima alnnubuwwata waalkitaba faminhum muhtadin wakatheerun minhum fasiqoona
u: Humne Nooh aur Ibrahim ko bheja aur un dono ki nasal mein nabuwat aur kitaab rakh di phir unki aulad mein se kisi ne hidayat ikhtiyar ki aur bahut se faasiq ho gaye

ar: ثُمَّ قَفَّيۡنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيۡنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبۡنِ مَرۡيَمَ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡإِنجِيلَۖ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأۡفَةࣰ وَرَحۡمَةࣰۚ وَرَهۡبَانِيَّةً ٱبۡتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبۡنَٰهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ إِلَّا ٱبۡتِغَآءَ رِضۡوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوۡهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَاۖ فَـَٔاتَيۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡرَهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
t: Thumma qaffayna AAala atharihim birusulina waqaffayna biAAeesa ibni maryama waataynahu alinjeela wajaAAalna fee quloobi allatheena ittabaAAoohu rafatan warahmatan warahbaniyyatan ibtadaAAooha ma katabnaha AAalayhim illa ibtighaa ridwani Allahi fama raAAawha haqqa riAAayatiha faatayna allatheena amanoo minhum ajrahum wakatheerun minhum fasiqoona
u: Unke baad humne pai dar pai (succession) apne Rasool bheje, aur in sabke baad Isa ibn-e-Maryam ko maboos kiya aur usko Injil ata ki, aur jin logon ne uski pairvi ikhtiyar ki unke dilon mein humne taras (tenderness ) aur reham daal diya. Aur rahbaniyat (monasticism) unhon ne khud ijaad karli, humne usey unpar farz nahin kiya tha. Magar Allah ki khushnudi ki talab mein unhon ne aap hi yeh bidaat nikali aur phir iski pabandi karne ka jo haqq tha usey ada na kiya. Unmein se jo log iman laye huye thay unka ajr humne unko ata kiya, magar unmein se aksar log faasiq hain

ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُواْ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤۡتِكُمۡ كِفۡلَيۡنِ مِن رَّحۡمَتِهِۦ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ نُورࣰ ا تَمۡشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمࣱ‏
t: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ittaqoo Allaha waaminoo birasoolihi yutikum kiflayni min rahmatihi wayajAAal lakum nooran tamshoona bihi wayaghfir lakum waAllahu ghafoorun raheemun
u: Aey logon jo iman laye ho, Allah se daro aur uske Rasool par iman lao. Allah tumhein apni Rehmat ka dohra hissa ata farmyega aur tumhein wahi noor bakhshega jiski roshni mein tum chaloge, aur tumhare kasoor maaf kardega.Allah bada maaf karne wala aur meharbaan hai

ar: لِّئَلَّا يَعۡلَمَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَلَّا يَقۡدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَيۡءࣲ مِّن فَضۡلِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَنَّ ٱلۡفَضۡلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤۡتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلۡفَضۡلِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
t: Lialla yaAAlama ahlu alkitabi alla yaqdiroona AAala shayin min fadli Allahi waanna alfadla biyadi Allahi yuteehi man yashao waAllahu thoo alfadli alAAatheemi
u: (Tumko yeh rawish ikhtiyar karni chahiye) taa-ke ehle kitaab ko maalom ho jaye ke Allah ke fazal par unka koi ijara (control/ikhtiyar) nahin hai, aur yeh ke Allah ka fazal uske apne hi haath mein hai, Jisey chahta hai ata farmata hai. Aur woh badey fazal(bounty) wala hai
